BROWSE GALLERY ART
Welcome to our mountain gallery & studio space
Explore & discover your creative dreams!

Many thanks to those who have sent messages and offers of help in this challenging time.
CLASSES ARE BACK IN FULL SWING!
We will be working to open the gallery again as soon as we are able.
Until then please support our beautiful space by buying our online art
 
Please note that all prices do not have postage or delivery,
The artist will be in contact after checkout to help with postage or delivery options.
(We have had to relocate all art back to artists temporarily)

Still Standing Book 2022
This book is a full colour collection of art from the STILL STANDING EXHIBITION Featuring over 35 different artists from around the Yarra Ranges region who use arts and creativity to facilitate the journey through management and recovery of their mental health and wellbeing. It follows the widely noted Endure Exhibition for Women held at Kapi Art Space in 2019 and Endure e-merge on-line exhibition in 2020.
Kapi Art Space 4-13th March.  
  Thanks to the Yarra Ranges Council for their generous support of this event and book.
BUY YOUR COPY
ENDURE BOOK
We are now pre-selling copies of the book for $25 and all profits from the sale of the book will be reinvested by Kapi Art Space to deliver future arts based mental health and wellbeing programs across the region.
READ MORE HERE

  Kapi is the Pitjantjatjara word for
                    Water 
   Kapi Art Space
Story
Kapi is the Pitjantjatjara word for 'Water'. 
Kapi Art Space is  situated near the top of the Dandenong Ranges in Victoria.  A place of refreshing, refilling and restoration for all who are thirsty. The space is designed to serve artists, communities and all who walk through the door. 
   READ MORE
Art Classes & Workshops
with Heather Bradbury 
Artist, Teacher, Mentor
Head on over to Heather's website and check out her art and the workshops and classes she is running for term two Kapi Art Space including workshops, group classes, private classes and more! ONLINE SOON!
